doc.fullName: Cuban Alliance of Instructors in Kundalini Yoga
doc.tagline: Kundalini Yoga as taught by Yogi Bhajan®
doc.title: Information for Instructors
doc.subtitle: Membership guide for KRI-certified instructors
doc.footer: ACIKY · Cuban Alliance of Instructors in Kundalini Yoga · aciky.org
doc.lineage: Kundalini Yoga as taught by Yogi Bhajan®

who.title: Who we are
who.p1: ACIKY is Cuba's National Kundalini Yoga Teachers Association (NKYTA), affiliated with IKYTA — the International Kundalini Yoga Teachers Association. We are the official community of KRI-certified instructors in Cuba, internationally recognized.
who.p2: Our mission is to uplift and empower Kundalini Yoga teachers in Cuba — supporting their practice, expanding yoga communities, and sharing the sacred science of Kundalini Yoga across every corner of the country.

requirements.title: Essential requirement
requirements.kri: KRI (Kundalini Research Institute) Level 1 certification or higher
requirements.yb: ACIKY exclusively supports and represents the practice of Kundalini Yoga as taught by Master Yogi Bhajan. This is the framework from which we work and the lineage we honor.

participation.title: Participation
participation.description: Participation in ACIKY activities is not mandatory, but it is deeply valued. There are many ways to contribute, and each one adds to the growth of the community:

leadership.title: Leadership structure
leadership.description: ACIKY has a leadership structure that oversees the growth and integrity of the organization. All members are invited to be part of it:
leadership.invite: The Board Committee is open to all members who feel called to contribute to ACIKY's growth. If you feel that call, reach out to us.

festival.title: Festival Faro de Luz
festival.description: Annual event bringing together instructors and practitioners with teachings from internationally recognized teachers.

routes.title: Golden Routes
routes.description: Missions to bring Kundalini Yoga to provinces and remote communities across Cuba.

sadhana.title: Online Sadhana
sadhana.description: Collective practice during the Ambrosial Hours. Guided by a certified teacher from Mexico.

classes.title: Classes and Workshops
classes.description: Regular classes and specialized workshops taught by KRI-certified instructors across different provinces.

rebirthing.title: Rebirthing
rebirthing.description: Rebirthing Breathwork sessions facilitated by certified instructors for healing and expansion of consciousness.

quote.text: "Love is the ultimate experience. There is no obstacle that love cannot overcome."

join.title: How to join?
join.description: If you hold your KRI certification and feel called to be part of ACIKY, reach out through any of these channels:
